Title: A New Bill Takes Aim at Government Pressure to Silence Lawful Online Speech

Title: Self-improving agents still need humans

Title: I Replaced JSON With a Custom Binary Format. In PHP. :: Tom J.

When we wanted to split editing and printing, we opted for JSON.But now we want to manipulate data inside effectively. And there, we decided to create a binary format.It proved to be faster, smaller and easier to change.
